name: CQE-E/G8
purpose: Provide the CQE E/G8 gate layer for NVEST wave investigation candidates.

canonical_loop.seal: hide expected result or validation label
canonical_loop.reveal: held-out result revealed after gate commitment
canonical_loop.bind: bind accepted result to library or mark candidate new datum

required_honesty_layer.name: Hidden Guess Result
required_honesty_layer.rule: Every gate decision commits before result reveal.

required_cqe_layer.rule: E/G8 maps gate behavior to E8 formal structure to product decision to library binding.
